::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">3</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202408443" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">3D Lead-Organoselenide-Halide Perovskites and their Mixed-Chalcogenide and Mixed-Halide Alloys</span>

H. Karunadasa, J. Li, Y. Wang, S. Saha, Z. Chen, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, J. Misleh, K. W. Chapman, J. A. Reimer, and M. R. Filip

*Angew. Chem. Int. Ed.* **2024**, *63*, e202408443. DOI: 10.1002/anie.202408443
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](03_2024_perovskites/perovskites1_TOC.jpg)
:::

:::
